summary: LUMEN deployment verification completed. Backend APIs and frontend public website tested successfully. 8/9 backend tests passed, all frontend tests passed.

minor_bugs.issue: Response format does not include 'ok' field, returns user object directly
minor_bugs.impact: Minor - session cookie is set correctly and subsequent auth flows work

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/readyz returns ready=true with mongo and config checks
Backend: GET /api/assets returns 200 (empty list is valid)
Backend: GET /api/public/otc/listings returns 6 listings with asset enrichment
Backend: GET /api/public/otc/listings/{id} returns full detail with payout history (12 points)
Backend: GET /api/auth/me works with demo session cookie
Backend: GET /api/investor/portfolio accessible with demo session
Backend: POST /api/auth/login with operator@atlas.dev works correctly
Frontend: Landing page loads without red-screen errors
Frontend: Header navigation (menu button, language switcher, login button) works
Frontend: Landing page content sections render (hero, stats, categories, journey)
Frontend: OTC marketplace page loads and displays 12 listings
Frontend: OTC marketplace filters and search work
Frontend: OTC lot detail page loads with payout history and buy button
Frontend: Navigation between pages works correctly
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor: /api/auth/demo response format - returns user object directly instead of {ok: true, user: {...}}. This is cosmetic as the session cookie is set correctly and all downstream auth flows work. Consider standardizing response format for consistency.
